/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX26.5.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/benchmark_bc.dir/Breast_Cancer_Model/bc_benchmark.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark_bc.dir/Breast_Cancer_Model/bc_functions.cpp.o -o benchmark_bc  build_benchmark/src/libbenchmark.a build_benchmark/src/libbenchmark_main.a -lpthread build_benchmark/src/libbenchmark.a
